title: Top 10 Best Looking Angels
wikitext:
[]: Top 10 Best Looking Angels             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Nov 27, 2006 8:34 pm here it is the Top 10 Best Looking Angels (my opinion only). now lets c if we can make a discussion out of this. if u have any disagreements, jsut reply to this. 10.Arael 9.Ramiel 8.Lilith 7.Leliel 6.Bardiel 5.Gaghiel 4.Adam 3.Israfel 2.Zaruel 1.Sachiel

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Mon Nov 27, 2006 10:45 pm Well, I don't see a need for a discussion but I guess I would put Bardiel in second and bump Zereul to third

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Mon Nov 27, 2006 10:51 pm Why's Bardiel even on the list? Bardiel's just lightning or a pile of white goo depending on the scene. Bardiel != Eva-03.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Nov 27, 2006 11:21 pm You know, I never noticed it until now, but for some reason Zruel reminds me of a walrus... Gaghiel for the win.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue Nov 28, 2006 12:23 am I've been a fan of Arael, myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Nov 28, 2006 12:44 am I vote for Leliel Not to be anal, but shouldn't this go in Chit Chat?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Nov 28, 2006 1:31 am Israfel looks pretty cool, but I enjoy the surrealistic looking angels such as Leliel aswell. As stated by previous posters, this goes in Chit-chat.

[]:             Quote Post by Dascoo » Tue Nov 28, 2006 7:13 am Bardiel for me....well it's just Eva-03, but still Eva-03 looks so cool.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Nov 28, 2006 10:37 am It's be easier to make a list of angels you like the least.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Nov 28, 2006 11:12 am 3. Zeruel 2. Arael 1. Bardiel (Eva-03) for me

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Tue Nov 28, 2006 2:16 pm 1. Gaghiel I've always had an affinity for underwater monsters.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Nov 28, 2006 4:39 pm Arael is my favorite for now. Ask me again in a month and it may change. But I do agree that Zeruel looks sort of like a walrus.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Nov 28, 2006 6:42 pm Zeruel looks like a flying Gateway 2000 ad.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Nov 28, 2006 7:03 pm 1. Tabris 2. Tabris 3. Tabris 4. Tabris 5. Tabris 6. Tabris 7. Tabris 8. Tabris 9. Tabris 10. Tabris

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Nov 29, 2006 4:11 am totally Iruel right?... 1. GNR...(does that really count...we could get into a disscussion about why GNR looked like Rei...was Rei in control there or was Lilith...Rei is made from Lilith so maybe thats what Lilith looked like originally...anyway) 2. Arael...its bizzarre and complicated, yet accurately placed and patterned wings give it a very elegant appearance...also its gleaming whiteness against tha blackness of out space...plus its being out of orbit...give it a tone of "I am superior and holier than thou" kind of like a filthy rich pompous man in power looking arrogantly down at a peddler from the veiw of window... 3. Tabris...the white hair and red eyes are cool...plus a human appearance is familiar...which is comforting...even if Kaworu is an ass... ...Sahaquiel was the worst looking one...he just looked stupid...like a little kid's crayon drawing...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Nov 29, 2006 8:08 am no! its all about Sachiel!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Nov 29, 2006 2:52 pm master0rolando wrote: even if Kaworu is an ass

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Nov 29, 2006 2:57 pm You really love him, don't you... :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Nov 29, 2006 2:59 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: You really love him, don't you... :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Dascoo » Wed Nov 29, 2006 3:54 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: You really love him, don't you... :roll:
summary:
[]: Top 10 Best Looking Angels             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Nov 27, 2006 8:34 pm here it is the Top 10 Best Looking Angels (my opinion only). now lets c if we can make a discussion out of this. if u have any disagreements, jsut reply to this. 10.Arael 9.Ramiel 8.Lilith 7.Leliel 6.Bardiel 5.Gaghiel 4.Adam 3.Israfel 2.Zaruel 1.Sachiel

[]:             Quote Post by Darius &raq
